---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new platform adapter or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature related to a problem?**
Describe the problem you're trying to solve.

**Describe the solution**
What you'd like to see added (e.g., WhatsApp adapter, better table support, etc.)

**Describe alternatives considered**
Any other ways you've thought of.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, examples, platform documentation links.
